canFirewallConfig.xmlFWCfg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<can>
  <!-- Whitelist CFW_FBS_CEEACE.xml generated from template file on 09.12.25 08:44:39 -->
  <bus number="0" udslimiter="20" logging="0">
    <!-- allow all 29-bit Rx-IDs -->
    <rawfilter id="0x00000000x" mask="0x00000000" tx="false" rx="true"/>
    <!-- HWEISER: even though we are having an open CAN filter definition at the moment I am starting to add CEEAce specific frames -->
    <!-- ROELite messages for all ECUs which are sending this - DTTPSW-50981 -->
    <rawfilter id="0x18EFFD00x" mask="0x1FFFFF00" tx="false" rx="true"/>
    <!-- SCA_C24 - DTTPSW-32433 -->
    <rawfilter id="0x18FF2421x" mask="0x1FFFFFFF" tx="false" rx="true"/>
  </bus>
  <bus number="1" udslimiter="20" logging="0">
    <!-- allow all 29-bit Rx-IDs -->
    <rawfilter id="0x00000000x" mask="0x00000000" tx="false" rx="true"/>
  </bus>
  <bus number="2" udslimiter="20" logging="0">
    <!-- allow all 29-bit Rx-IDs -->
    <rawfilter id="0x00000000x" mask="0x00000000" tx="false" rx="true"/>
    <!-- taken over from CFW_FBS_18_v3.3.6 bus number 2 -->
    <!-- perhaps there are entries inside which are actually not required anymore in an CTP3 CEEAce variant because functionality has been removed? -->
    <!-- mode, target and did entries limiter have been removed as per Boschs suggestion -->
    <!-- Diagnostic Session Control - Default Session - PosResp -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFB" sid="0x10"/>
    <!-- sid=0x11 was missing in CFW_FBS_18_v3.3.8.xml - took it anyway in -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFB" sid="0x11"/>
    <!-- Read DTC Information -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFB" sid="0x19"/>
    <!-- Read Data by Identifier -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFB" sid="0x22"/>
    <!-- Read Memory by Address -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFB" sid="0x23"/>
    <!-- sid=0x27 was missing in CFW_FBS_18_v3.3.8.xml for tester=0xFB - took it anyway in -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFB" sid="0x27"/>
    <!-- sid=0x28 was missing in CFW_FBS_18_v3.3.8.xml - took it anyway in -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFB" sid="0x28"/>
    <!-- sid=0x2E was missing in CFW_FBS_18_v3.3.8.xml for tester=0xFB - took it anyway in -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFB" sid="0x2E"/>
    <!-- Routine Control (Remote Company Card Authentification) -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFB" sid="0x31"/>
    <!-- sid=0x34 was missing in CFW_FBS_18_v3.3.8.xml - took it anyway in -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFB" sid="0x34"/>
    <!-- Request Upload -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFB" sid="0x35"/>
    <!-- Transfer Data -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFB" sid="0x36"/>
    <!-- Request Transfer Exit -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFB" sid="0x37"/>
    <!-- Tester Present -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFB" sid="0x3E"/>
    <!-- sid=0x85 was missing in CFW_FBS_18_v3.3.8.xml - took it anyway in -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFB" sid="0x85"/>
    <!-- Diagnostic Session Control - Default Session - PosResp -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFD" sid="0x10"/>
    <!-- sid=0x11 was missing in CFW_FBS_18_v3.3.8.xml - took it anyway in -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFD" sid="0x11"/>
    <!-- Read DTC Information -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFD" sid="0x19"/>
    <!-- Read Data by Identifier -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFD" sid="0x22"/>
    <!-- Read Memory by Address -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFD" sid="0x23"/>
    <!-- Security Access Send/Request Seed Lvl 9 for "COM unlock" -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFD" sid="0x27"/>
    <!-- sid=0x28 was missing in CFW_FBS_18_v3.3.8.xml - took it anyway in -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFD" sid="0x28"/>
    <!-- Write Data by Identifier "Write Configuration Fingerprint" for "COM unlock" -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFD" sid="0x2E"/>
    <!-- Routine Control: Read reset counter -->
    <!-- Routine Control: CAN snapshot -->
    <!-- Routine Control: Set Flag FleetBoard active -->
    <!-- Routine Control: Read all error number information -->
    <!-- Routine Control: Set Flag FleetBoard not active -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFD" sid="0x31"/>
    <!-- sid=0x34 was missing in CFW_FBS_18_v3.3.8.xml - took it anyway in -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFD" sid="0x34"/>
    <!-- Request Upload -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFD" sid="0x35"/>
    <!-- Transfer Data -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFD" sid="0x36"/>
    <!-- Request Transfer Exit -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFD" sid="0x37"/>
    <!-- Tester Present -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFD" sid="0x3E"/>
    <!-- sid=0x85 was missing in CFW_FBS_18_v3.3.8.xml - took it anyway in -->
    <udsfilter tester="0xFD" sid="0x85"/>
  </bus>
</can>

gprsConfiguration: GPRSConfig[CommunicationConfigurationMessage[communicationConfiguration=[CommunicationConfiguration[mnc=[01], mcc=262, pollingInterval=5, securityId=prd.dteu, discoveryEndPoint=ServerEndPoint[ipAddress=discovery.weu.prd-eu.platform.csg.daimlertruck.com, port=52445], publicApn=internet.m2mportal.de, publicApnUsername=, publicApnPassword=, discoveryRegEndPoint=ServerEndPoint[ipAddress=device-registration.weu.prd-eu.platform.csg.daimlertruck.com, port=52545]]]]]
